description: Report generation functionality depends on enterprise information entry and financing diagnosis analysis
Report analysis recommendations depend on report structure generation
Report file saving depends on report generation functionality
Historical report archiving requires multiple report generations to provide test data
Report comparison functionality depends on historical report archiving, requires at least 2 historical reports
Chart generation depends on enterprise data and diagnosis results
Radar chart generation depends on multi-dimensional scoring data
Reasoning explanation query depends on diagnosis analysis results
Keyword navigation depends on report generation and reasoning explanation
